## What is Missive?

Missive is a team email and messaging platform that turns a shared inbox into a collaborative workspace. Multiple teammates can draft a reply together, leave internal comments on a thread, and assign conversations as tasks — all without the customer seeing any of it. It supports email alongside SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, and social media DMs in a single interface.

## Who is it for?

Missive is a strong fit for small and mid-sized teams that handle a high volume of customer communication across multiple channels and want to coordinate responses internally without forwarding emails or using a separate chat tool. Support teams, agencies, and operations teams that live in email are its core audience.

## Strengths

- **Real-time co-authoring** — multiple users can write and edit a draft reply simultaneously before it's sent.
- **Internal comments** — leave private notes on any conversation thread, visible only to teammates.
- **Omnichannel inbox** — email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, and social DMs in one unified view.
- **Task and assignment system** — conversations can be assigned to teammates with statuses and due dates.
- **Usage-based AI pricing** — AI features are billed through your own AI provider account rather than a fixed monthly surcharge.

## What to consider

- Missive is primarily an inbox tool, not a full CRM; contact history and deal tracking are limited.
- The free plan is capped at 3 users with restricted history — most teams will need a paid tier quickly.
- Integration depth with external CRMs requires manual configuration or Zapier.

## Bottom line

Missive is one of the cleanest collaborative inbox tools available, especially for teams that struggle to coordinate email replies without stepping on each other. It doesn't replace a CRM, but as the communications layer in front of one, it's excellent.
